message.content:
@startuml
actor Activity as A1
participant BaseMediaActivity as BMA
participant MediaActivity as MA

A1 ->> BMA : onCreate()
activate BMA
BMA >> BMA : set theme\nsetup navigation drawer\ndetermine ActionBar title/icon state from intent extras or savedInstanceState
alt [new activity]
    activate MA
    BMA --> MA : getActionBarTitle()\ngetHomeIconResIdFromIntentExtrasOrSavedInstanceState()
    deactivate MA
    
else [restore action bar]\n[no fragment in layout (restored)]
end


note right of BMA 
set home icon to hamburger icon if new activity; otherwise use saved instance data for both icons and titles. If restoring an existing session without fragments present yet then create them now too! Otherwise just update current ones based on user selection later down below...  
end note 

deactivate bma  

a2 <<Actor>> "User" #red { color=black } 


b3 ==interface== IBusinessLogicService {}  


c4 [[database]] DBConnectionPoolManagerImpl implements ConnectionFactoryInterface{}



d5 entity CustomerAccountDetails extends  CompellingReasonToUpdateThemSuch As Security Vulnerabilities Or Performance Bottlenecks Identified During Load Testing Phases Prior To Deployment Dates Set By
